MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion for entry of consent judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and Judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not reported. (D302)
